word: G2905 - κραυγάζω - kraugázō - krow-gad'-zo - Cry out

sections.paragraph:
- Original: κραυγάζω

- Transliteration: Kraugazo

- Phonetic: krow-gad'-zo

- Definition:

1. to cry out, cry aloud, to shout, to cry out to one

- Origin: from G2906

- TDNT entry: 17:58,5

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2906; to clamor: - cry out.
